Ruben Vargas has left FC Augsburg to join Sevilla.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer target opens contract talks with Sevilla
arts.sum: Real Madrid will look to address the right-back position in the next couple of years, and one player that they’ve been linked with is Juanlu Sanchez.
